hero.title: Enterprise Product Ad
hero.description: Create professional enterprise advertisements with AI. Generate compelling B2B marketing content that drives business conversions. Perfect for B2B marketers, enterprise sales teams, and business development professionals who need to communicate value propositions effectively.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your enterprise product or service

steps.title: Input your enterprise offering
steps.description: Provide detailed information about your B2B product or service, including value propositions, target industries, and key business benefits.

steps.title: Choose professional ad style
steps.description: Select from corporate, technical, or solution-focused advertisement styles optimized for business audiences and decision-makers.

steps.title: Generate enterprise-grade ads
steps.description: AI creates sophisticated advertisements with professional messaging, business-appropriate imagery, and compelling value propositions.

steps.title: Deploy across B2B channels
steps.description: Export high-resolution advertisements ready for LinkedIn, industry publications, trade shows, and professional marketing campaigns.

items.question: What is the Enterprise Product Ad workflow?
items.answer: Enterprise Product Ad is an AI-powered workflow that creates professional enterprise advertisements. Generate compelling B2B marketing content that drives business conversions.

items.question: Who is Enterprise Product Ad designed for?
items.answer: Enterprise Product Ad is essential for B2B marketing and enterprise sales: B2B marketers, enterprise sales teams, business development professionals, and marketing agencies who need professional B2B content.

items.question: What kind of input do I need to start?
items.answer: You provide detailed information about your B2B product or service, including value propositions, target industries, and key business benefits.

items.question: What type of output can I expect from this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow generates sophisticated advertisements with professional messaging, business-appropriate imagery, and compelling value propositions.

items.question: Can I create ads for different industries?
items.answer: Yes. You can create industry-specific advertisements that speak directly to your target market's unique challenges and needs.

items.question: How do credits and pricing work for EnterpriseAC ProductAd?
items.answer: Each advertisement generation consumes credits based on the image complexity and customization. The cost is optimized for creating high-impact B2B content.

items.question: Can I maintain brand consistency across all enterprise materials?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow incorporates your brand elements, corporate messaging, and visual identity while maintaining professional B2B standards.

items.question: Is this suitable for technical products and services?
items.answer: Yes. Perfect for communicating complex technical solutions and enterprise offerings in an accessible, professional format.
